antipattern.description: Establishing the baseline from a sample of the test set instead of the full set.
antipattern.reason: Baseline variance is underestimated; later runs look like regressions when they are within noise. Detector: n_questions in baseline < n_questions in test set. Fix: r1-full-set.

antipattern.description: Reporting a single 'quality score' that mixes retrieval and generation metrics.
antipattern.reason: Localising failure is impossible. Detector: report has one number, no retrieval/generation split. Fix: r2-separate-stages.

antipattern.description: Eval report lacks pipeline version, judge model, or index hash.
antipattern.reason: Cross-run comparison is meaningless; reproduction impossible. Detector: snapshot block missing. Fix: r5-version-snapshot.
